source.citation: May, E. F.; Guo, J. Y.; Oakley, J. H.; Hughes, T. J.; Graham, B. F.; Marsh, K. N.; Huang, S. H. Reference Quality Vapor-Liquid Equilibrium Data for the Binary Systems Methane + Ethane, + Propane, + Butane and, + 2-Methylpropane, at Temperatures from (203 to 273) K and Pressures to 9 MPa. J. Chem. Eng. Data 2015, 60 (12), 3606-3620. https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jced.5b00610
notes: Tie-line extracted from the public NIST ThermoML JSON mirror for DOI 10.1021/acs.jced.5b00610.
Pressure came from ThermoML PureOrMixtureData 3 and gas-phase propane composition from PureOrMixtureData 4 at the same temperature and liquid methane composition.
First promoted literature VLE tie-line anchor from the external acquisition manifest.
The liquid methane mole fraction is reported directly in ThermoML; the gas methane mole fraction is 1 - y_C3 from the ThermoML gas-phase propane composition.
